guitars.title: Axe Design Lab
guitars.description: Ibanez has been creating innovations which do not only fit the unique demands of players from that period, but also eventually turn into industrial standards, such as 7 string, 8 string and Multi scale guitars. All these started from our attitude to be "Innovative, Cutting-Edge and Pioneer". Axe Design Lab is the series fully represents this attitude.

guitars.title: Visions
guitars.description: Materializing the vision of Ibanez. Untethered from the paradigm, allowing for infinite possibilities. This spirit is the driving force of our imagination, and the nature of our craftsmanship. Ibanez VISIONS This instrument is a masterwork that connects the past, present, and future of Ibanez as one.
